title: JUNING Travel Sewing Kit Portable Sewing Supplies Accessories for Adults, Beginner, Home, Emergency, Including Needle and Thread kit, Scissors,Tape Measure, Seam Ripper
features: Due to a change in zipper style, the received product may differ slightly from the image. You may receive either the version depicted in the image or the one shown in the video

Including the necessary sewing accessories for performing basic repairs, such as sewing needles, sewing threads, scissors, hidden buttons, threader tools, seam ripper, measuring tape, safety pins and seam ripper

Smart and Compact. The straps hold the spools and tools in their places, which makes it easy to find them and mend anything you want without any worry about losing them in your bag, purse, drawer, or anywhere

Easy and Fun to Use. Compact design makes it convenient to carry in style anywhere you travel. Use your hand to repair your pet's favourite clothes or your kid's stuffed toys. You may fall in love with the feeling of DIY
A Practical Gift for All Ages.Your wise choice of a gift for your mom, grandma, and best friends. Nice for beginners, crafters, or DIY lovers
description: Product Description Start creating your own beautiful works of art! Colorful thread spools- contains 18 colors of spools for your sewing emergency. Contains all the little tools for basic sewing With our needlework kit, you can unleash your creativity and make beautiful pieces of art. Whether you want to embroider a pillowcase, create a tapestry, or stitch a portrait, our kit has got you covered. See More
